facts.claim: Synthetix is the perps trading protocol provider for Infinex (alongside Hyperliquid and Lighter)
Synthetix perps integration is present in the Infinex platform codebase (provider config, balance hooks, deposit/withdrawal routing all implemented)
facts.value: Synthetix perps code is fully landed in the Infinex platform codebase

facts.claim: Synthetix perps in Infinex: collateral token
Synthetix perps in Infinex: settlement chain
Synthetix perps in Infinex: minimum deposit (USD)
Synthetix perps in Infinex: minimum withdrawal (USD)
Synthetix perps in Infinex: deposit method
facts.value: Direct USDT deposits only — no swidge (cross-asset swap/bridge). directDepositOnly: true in platform config.

Decentralized derivatives exchange offering perpetual futures contracts on Ethereum Mainnet. All markets are quoted and settled in USDT on-chain. Uses a central limit order book (CLOB). Cross-margin across all positions in a subaccount.

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: listed markets (as of Feb 2026)
facts.value: 10 markets: BTC-USDT, ETH-USDT, SOL-USDT, XRP-USDT, DOGE-USDT, ZEC-USDT, FARTCOIN-USDT, 1000PEPE-USDT, XMR-USDT, PUMP-USDT

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: maximum leverage for BTC and ETH markets
facts.source_ref: https://docs.synthetix.io/trading/markets — Risk parameters table: BTC-USDT Max leverage 50×, ETH-USDT Max leverage 50×

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: maximum leverage across all markets (highest cap)
facts.value: 50x (BTC-USDT, ETH-USDT, SOL-USDT, XRP-USDT, DOGE-USDT); 25x (ZEC-USDT, 1000PEPE-USDT); 10x (FARTCOIN-USDT, XMR-USDT, PUMP-USDT)
facts.source_ref: https://docs.synthetix.io/trading/markets — Risk parameters by market table

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: collateral / settlement token per official docs
facts.value: USDT — all markets quoted and settled in USDT on Ethereum Mainnet
facts.source_ref: https://docs.synthetix.io/trading/markets — 'All markets on Synthetix are perpetual futures quoted and settled in USDT on Ethereum Mainnet'

facts.value: Cross-margin — all positions in a subaccount share a single collateral pool. At 50x leverage, IMR is 2% and MMR is 1%.

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: Infinex display name in platform code
Infinex perps app: existing provider alongside Synthetix
facts.value: Hyperliquid (already live in platform; Lighter is also a third provider in codebase)

facts.claim: Synthetix perps: estimated deposit settlement time in Infinex
facts.value: 5 minutes (ESTIMATED_STANDARD_SETTLEMENT_TIME_MIN — slower than Hyperliquid's 2-min fast settlement)

unverifiable.claim: Synthetix perps are 'live' / publicly launched inside Infinex (vs. code-landed but behind a feature flag or not yet announced)
unverifiable.reason: Platform code is fully implemented (provider config, balance hooks, deposit/withdraw routing all present), but no feature-flag search found an explicit enabled/disabled gate, and the rendered Infinex perps page only showed Hyperliquid data. Cannot confirm from available sources whether Synthetix is user-facing live or still in pre-launch.
